---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea to improve GemFinder
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it solves
Describe the problem this feature would solve. Is it related to a current limitation?

## Proposed solution
Describe how you'd like the feature to work.

## Alternative approaches
Describe any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional context
Add any other context, links, or references here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I've provided a clear description of the use case
